description:
Real-time battery stats & health estimator for OnePlus/Oppo/Realme phones
PlusPlus Battery gives you everything you ever wanted to know about your phoneвЂ™s
battery вЂ” from simple level and power readings to deep-dive metrics.
It is designed and tested on modern OnePlus/Oppo/Realme devices,
but also works on most recent AOSP-based ROMs.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
в–   KEY FEATURES
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
вЂў Real-time dashboard
  вЂ“ Level, voltage, current, charge / discharge power
  вЂ“ Works with and without root

вЂў Battery-health estimation
  вЂ“ Without root access: Calculates Full-Charge-Capacity when the
    battery is exactly 100 % and reaches 0 mA current

вЂў Cycle-count history
  вЂ“ Saves todayвЂ™s cycle count to a local Room database each time you open the
    app, and shows the trend in a timeline view

вЂў Persistent monitor notification
  вЂ“ Ongoing notification-area battery monitor with customizable metrics

вЂў Optional root mode
  вЂ“ Reads additional sysfs nodes under /sys/class/oplus_chg/battery and some other directories, including
    вЂў Current remaining capacity (battery_rm)
    вЂў FCC (battery_fcc) and SOH (battery_soh)
    вЂў Raw, uncompensated FCC/SOH values (especially for silicon batteries)
    вЂў Under-voltage shut-down threshold (vbat_uv)
    вЂў Battery serial number, manufacture date, Qmax, and more
  - Reads generic linux power supply files under /sys/class/power_supply/battery for universal devices
    вЂў Customizable paths/titles/units for anything you want to read with root access

вЂў Experimental
  - Gets battery data from logcat (root required)
    вЂў Currently only some OPlus, Moto & Xiaomi devices are supported (depends on models and systems)
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
в–   INSTALLATION
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
1. Make sure your handset runs a recent OxygenOS / ColorOS build or another
   up-to-date Android ROM.
2. Install the APK (or via F-Droid once this package is published).
3. Launch and grant the requested permissions.
4. (Optional) Grant root to unlock advanced metrics.
5. (Optional) To make the monitor service work as intended, disable battery optimisation for
   PlusPlusBattery and, on ColorOS 15, enable вЂњAuto-launchвЂќ.
6. (Optional) For non-Oppo/OnePlus/Realme devices, you may want to disable the option 'Show OPlus exclusive entries' to hide those useless data under root mode.

в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
в–   PRIVACY & OPEN SOURCE
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
There are **no ads, no trackers, no internet permissions**.
вЂў Application source code в”Ђ MIT Licence
вЂў Material Icons (Google Fonts) в”Ђ Apache Licence 2.0

See the LICENSE and THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES files in the repository for full texts.

Special thanks to github user @shminer for the original FCC/SOH compensation research and
algorithm contributions.

GitHub  вћњ  https://github.com/dijia1124/plusplusbattery
Issues  вћњ  https://github.com/dijia1124/plusplusbattery/issues
